texto: I have watched the tears of frustration of a stroke victim or the autistic child who struggles to communicate a need or thought, but no one understands. Eventually, the soul grows quiet and gives up. At every stage of life, and in every circumstance, we search for someone who understands what we are going through.
explicacao: Citação de Donna Mull sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “I have watched the tears of frustration of a stroke victim or the autistic child who struggles to…” articula reflexao, thought-provoking, touching em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como touching.
